form.formComment: Gelding by Frankel making his first appearance. Finished fifth in a Cranbourne jump-out on March 30. Did not show a great deal at the trials and prefer to see in a race before backing.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Gelding by Frankel making his first appearance. Finished fifth in a Cranbourne jump-out on March 30. Did not show a great deal at the trials and prefer to see in a race before backing.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after six months rolled along in front before being edged out 3rd of 7 at Sandown-Lakeside 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 25 over 1200m, on a slow track; 2.5 len behind Santana with 58kg at $7. Previously second-up 2nd of 9 at Sandown-Hillside Mdn-Sw on August 27 over 1300m, on a slow track; 0.8 len behind Rock Them Jools with 57kg at $15. Fitter and finds an ideal race.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2.5). Second-up. Previously second-up 2nd of 9 at Sandown-Hillside Mdn-Sw on August 27 over 1300m, on a slow track; 0.8 len behind Rock Them Jools with 57kg at $15. Fitter and finds an ideal race.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after six months 2nd in a small field at Geelong Mdn-Sw on April 1 over 1100m, 0.5 len behind Pasadena with 59kg at $13. Previously second-up ran last of 7 at Sandown-Hillside Mdn-Sw on October 1 over 1000m, 6 len behind Proficient carrying 57kg at $26. Should prove hard to hold out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2.5). Second-up. First-up after six months 2nd in a small field at Geelong Mdn-Sw on April 1 over 1100m, 0.5 len behind Pasadena with 59kg at $13. Previously second-up ran last of 7 at Sandown-Hillside Mdn-Sw on October 1 over 1000m, 6 len behind Proficient carrying 57kg at $26. Should prove hard to hold out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin. Laid in under pressure in the early part of the straight.

form.formComment: Three-year-old gelding making debut by Fierce Impact out of Justine. Was runner-up in a jump-out at Pakenham on March 31. Looks to have ability and looks sure to make a bright start to his career.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Three-year-old gelding making debut by Fierce Impact out of Justine. Was runner-up in a jump-out at Pakenham on March 31. Looks to have ability and looks sure to make a bright start to his career.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. At the latest run made some head-way from midfield; 3rd of 11 at Pakenham 3yo Mdn-Sw on April 2 over 1200m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind Gazerati with 56.5kg at $9. The run before that sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 10 at Pakenham Mdn-Sw on March 19 over 1100m, slow going 2 len behind Two To Tango carrying 57kg at $21. Looks a solid top-three prospect.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1.5). Form hard to fault. At the latest run made some head-way from midfield; 3rd of 11 at Pakenham 3yo Mdn-Sw on April 2 over 1200m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind Gazerati with 56.5kg at $9. The run before that sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 10 at Pakenham Mdn-Sw on March 19 over 1100m, slow going 2 len behind Two To Tango carrying 57kg at $21. Looks a solid top-three prospect.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Jumped outwards at the start, making contact with Perfect Link.

form.formComment: Last start second last of 7 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1600m, slow going 6 len behind Impulsive Reaction carrying 59kg at $26. The run before that 7th of 11 at Ballarat 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 20 over 1600m, 6 len behind Lufitaah with 58kg at $31. Rates poorly so happy to overlook.

formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0.5). Last start second last of 7 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1600m, slow going 6 len behind Impulsive Reaction carrying 59kg at $26. The run before that 7th of 11 at Ballarat 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 20 over 1600m, 6 len behind Lufitaah with 58kg at $31. Rates poorly so happy to overlook.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced three wide without cover throughout.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Most recently 3rd in a small field at this track 3yo F Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1400m, on a slow track; 4.5 len behind Parvenu carrying 57kg at $3.80. The start before that crossed from a wide gate to lead but couldn't hold on when 3rd of 12 at this track 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 13 over 1400m, 0.9 len behind Cadillac Sam carrying 56kg at $51. Has been racing well. Must be included.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the early and middle stages. Laid out rounding the home turn.

form.formComment: She is resuming after a six-and-a-half months break. Finished off last campaign second last of 10 at Bendigo 3yo Mdn-Sw September 17 over 1500m, soft track; 11 len behind Obvious with 56kg at $51. On debut seventh of 12 at Bairnsdale Mdn-Sw September 7 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Somebody Told Me carrying 55kg at $7.50. See this one.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped at the start. Raced keenly in the early stages when being restrained.

form.formComment: At debut, 9th of 12 at Pakenham 3yo F Mdn-Sw on March 19 over 1000m, on a slow track; 4.5 len behind Invincible Lover carrying 57kg at $13. Possible improver.
